name: Remote Services: SSH (loopback host-key scan)
description: Lateral Movement / TA0008. Use `ssh-keyscan` against the loopback address to capture the host key of any SSH daemon on the local box. Read-only — initiates a TCP connect to 127.0.0.1:22 and reads the SSH banner + host key, no auth attempt. If no sshd is listening, ssh-keyscan exits non-zero; the envelope captures that. Loopback-only; the target is structural in the exec field.
